title: Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{MagazineIssue |image=[[File:TechJournal1.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Technical Journal
of the Planet Tatooine'' |editor=[[David Hutchison]] |cover artist= |contributors=[[Lora Johnson]] |publisher=[[Starlog Communications International]] |release date=*[[October]] [[1993]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/60|text=Tatooine}} *[[1996]] {{C|Special Edition}}''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces]]'', pg. 11, notes that the magazine's three Special Edition volumes were published prior to [[September 15]], [[1996]]. |subscribers= |pages=83 |isbn= |issn= |genre= |issue=1 |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine''''', also styled as '''''Star Wars Technical Journal Vol. 1''''', was the first of three volumes in ''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' magazine series from [[Starlog Communications International]]. It was published in [[October]] [[1993]]. The three volumes were later compiled into the compendium title ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]''. ''Volume One'' was reprinted in [[July]] [[1994]] with a new foil-embossed cover to herald the release of the series' [[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces|second]] and [[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces|third volumes]] later that year. In [[1996]], to celebrate the upcoming release of ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition]]'', Starlog reprinted all three volumes as "Special Edition" versions. Each Special Edition volume came in a sealed poly bag along with bonus content in the form of an eight-page gatefold supplement. A German-language version was also released in 1996 by [[Modern Graphics Distribution]].{{WebCite|url=https://jedi-bibliothek.de/datenbank/ausgabe/technisches-handbuch-des-planeten-tatooine|text=Star Wars Sonderband 1: Technisches Handbuch des Planeten Tatooine|work=Jedi-Bibliothek.de|archivedate=20230605141148}} {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== ===Features=== *[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] *[[Moisture farm/Legends|Moisture farms]] *[[Moisture vaporator/Legends|Moisture Vaporator]] *[[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] [[T-16 skyhopper/Legends|T-16 Skyhopper]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke's]] [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|Luke's Landspeeder]] *[[V-35 Courier/Legends|Lars Family Landspeeder]] *[[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Spaceport/Legends|Spaceport]] *[[Docking Bay 94/Legends|Docking Bay 94]] *[[Tatooine Visitors Bureau]] Brochure *[[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] *[[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] *[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] *[[Dewback/Legends|Dewback]] *[[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt Dragon]] *[[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|Ben Kenobi's House]] *[[Sandcrawler/Legends|Sandcrawler]] *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Palace]] *Jabba's Throne Room *[[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Rancor]] *Jabba's [[Skiff/Legends|Skiff]] *Jabba's [[Khetanna/Legends|Sail Barge]] *[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech Droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol Droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] ===Foldouts {{SectionFlag}}=== *''Millennium Falcon'' *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsabers]] *[[Droid/Legends|Droid]] Comparison Chart *Jabba's Pleasure Barge *[[Flare-S swoop/Legends|Swoop]] {{C|Special Edition -
